src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Security OAuth2 client configuration to use the new default method signature.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method .oauth2Client() without arguments is deprecated or removed in newer Spring Security versions, causing a compilation error or requiring explicit defaults.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' is a serial persistent field and must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ (or later) when the module system or strict checks are enabled, or to adhere to modern Java best practices enforced by the migration recipe.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+; using the old java.sun.com namespace causes deployment failures or classloading errors because the container expects jakarta.* packages and descriptors.
